title: doryopteris rigida
intro: Doryopteris rigida, also known as the Rigid Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Doryopteris rigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat various health issues.
